_comment: Pokemon with base stat changes across generations. Format: pokemon_id -> {gen_number: {stat: value}}. Only stats that DIFFER from current values are listed.
_note: This is a partial list of the most notable stat changes. Gen 1 'special' was a single stat split into sp_attack and sp_defense in Gen 2. Gen 6 saw many small buffs. A more complete list can be compiled from veekun/pokedex or PokemonDB.
